repo_notes.content: This wiki is only a test

pages.title: Overview
pages.purpose: Introduce the Smoke-And-Mirrors-AI repository, explaining its purpose as a Discord bot with LLM integration, and provide a high-level architectural overview

pages.title: Project Structure
pages.purpose: Detail the repository's directory organization, identifying major subsystems (discord_module, tools, memory_module, etc.) and their purposes

pages.title: Dependencies and Setup
pages.purpose: Document required Python packages, environment variables, and initial configuration needed to run the system

pages.title: SAM Core LLM System
pages.purpose: Comprehensive documentation of the SAM language model integration, including Ollama setup, model configuration, and the sam_message/sam_converse architecture

pages.title: LLM Interaction Flow
pages.purpose: Explain the two-stage interaction pattern (sam_converse vs sam_converse_files), prompt construction, and chat history integration

pages.title: System Prompts and Configuration
pages.purpose: Document the personality_system_prompt, chat_history_system_prompt, and model-specific parameters (temperature, num_ctx, think)

pages.title: Discord Integration
pages.purpose: Overview of how the bot connects to Discord, handles events, and processes messages from users

pages.title: Bot Initialization and Lifecycle
pages.purpose: Document the bot creation process, cog loading via setup_hook, event registration, and connection management

pages.title: Message Processing Pipeline
pages.purpose: Detail the message filtering, routing, and classification system that determines how incoming messages are handled

pages.title: Message Filtering and Triggers
pages.purpose: Explain the blacklist/whitelist system, command prefix detection, and trigger conditions (DMs, mentions, keywords)

pages.title: Message Caching System
pages.purpose: Document the session_chat_cache mechanism, including deque storage, message formatting, and role assignment

pages.title: Command System
pages.purpose: Catalog all available bot commands (traditional and slash commands), their purposes, and usage patterns

pages.title: Slash Commands Reference
pages.purpose: Detail each slash command (/analyze, /delete, /help, /neuralize, /status, /tts) with parameters and examples

pages.title: Traditional Commands
pages.purpose: Document prefix commands (ping, test) and their implementation in the Utility cog

pages.title: Tool Integration System
pages.purpose: Explain the architecture for integrating specialized tools with the LLM, including request classification and tool calling patterns

pages.title: Request Classification
pages.purpose: Document how classify_request determines whether a message is an attachment, weather request, search request, or conversation

pages.title: Weather Search Tool
pages.purpose: Comprehensive guide to the weather search system, including pattern detection, API integration, and response generation

pages.title: Weather Request Detection
pages.purpose: Detail the is_weather_request function, its NLP pattern matching, and location/intent detection logic

pages.title: Weather API Integration
pages.purpose: Document the geocoding process and National Weather Service API integration for retrieving weather data

pages.title: Weather Tool LLM Pipeline
pages.purpose: Explain the two-stage LLM approach: tool calling with llama3.2 and response synthesis with deepseek-r1

pages.title: Web Search Tool
pages.purpose: Document the internet search functionality, including search pattern detection and Google API integration

pages.title: Search Request Detection
pages.purpose: Explain the regex-based is_search_request system and search_patterns.json configuration

pages.title: Web Search LLM Pipeline
pages.purpose: Detail the search_the_web tool calling and response generation flow with dual LLM models

pages.title: Memory and State Management
pages.purpose: Overview of how the system maintains conversational context, logs interactions, and manages state across sessions

pages.title: Session Chat Cache
pages.purpose: Document the current_session_chat_cache deque, its 40-message capacity, and role-based message formatting

pages.title: Message Logging System
pages.purpose: Explain the audit trail creation, Markdown log file format, and what information is captured for each interaction

pages.title: Memory Module
pages.purpose: Document the per-channel message history caching and the gather_past_messages functionality

pages.title: Emotion System
pages.purpose: Describe the EmotionVector class, emotion normalization, and how emotional state is tracked (if actively used)

pages.title: Utilities and Extensions
pages.purpose: Document supporting systems for attachment handling, text-to-speech, and shared utility functions

pages.title: Attachment Processing
pages.purpose: Detail how Discord attachments are downloaded, digested, and categorized into text_data and image_data
